scripts.eval:gates: bun run build:deps && bun ./node_modules/.bin/evalite run src/prompt-gates.eval.ts --threshold=100
scripts.eval:suggested-fix: bun run build:deps && bun ./node_modules/.bin/evalite run src/suggested-fix-prompt.eval.ts --threshold=100
scripts.eval:dev: bun run build:deps && bun ./node_modules/.bin/evalite watch src/prompt-gates.eval.ts --threshold=100
scripts.eval:full: bun run build:deps && bun ./node_modules/.bin/evalite run src/prompt-evals.eval.ts --threshold=0
scripts.eval:full:export: bun run build:deps && bun ./node_modules/.bin/evalite run src/prompt-evals.eval.ts --threshold=0 --outputPath=./evalite-export/results.json
scripts.build:deps: bun run --cwd ../sdk build && bun run --cwd ../runtime build
scripts.format:check: biome format src evalite.config.ts package.json tsconfig.json
